title: FA Extensions - Bray's Chest GUI Fix
description: This is a temporary patch pack to fix vanilla chest models in the GUI slot when using Fresh Animation Extensions in newer versions of Minecraft
body:
<center>

### **BUG:**

![Chest GUI Models Bug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67aa24574bce45e76d982b8c9cd3127fb52d74b8.png)

### **FIX:**

![Chest GUI Models Fix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d3a3e07ae879d18287f8815859e5c178a1028e0.png)

</center>

**This is a temporary patch pack to fix vanilla chest models in the GUI slot when using [Fresh Animation Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) in newer versions of Minecraft**

---

[Go support FreshLX for their work :)](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)

The chest GUI model has been bugged for some time when using Fresh Animation Extensions which includes custom chest animations. This may be patched very shortly by FreshLX but in the mean time I created this pack to overwrite that bug by creating a custom inventory/GUI model for chests instead of one that was derived from the chest entity model which was causing the bug in the first place!
